g.text: Send the above packages to OEM
Deliver the packages to the factory
1. Generating keys and Materials owned by ODM
(ODM_KDK0, PKC, SBK, OEM_ID, and SN, etc.)
The fuseblob is encrypted and signed by ODM owned fskp key (or fskp expansion key).
1. Generating OEM K1 and K2 keys
1. Generating EPS Seed and EK Certificates
1. Generating the user-defined keys in EKB
2. Merging the EKB_ftpm_db from ODM and
3. Encrypting the EKB image by OEM K1.
2. Signing and encrypting the EKB_final_db by using PKC and SBK keys and output EKB_db.signed
2. Generating mass storage (eMMC or NVMe ) image package
Burn the OEM owned fuse: OEM_fuseblob
Burn the per device basis fuse: ODM_fuseblob_db
1. flashing images to QSPI and mass storage.
2. flashing the per device specific EKB from EKB_db.signed.
